raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I stayed at a hotel in XXXX, XXXX. 

At check-in, the hotel staff informed me that my credit card was not working, so I paid {$150.00} in cash at the front desk. 

However, {$130.00} was also charged to my Citi credit card ( ending XXXX ) on the same date. This constitutes a double charge and is unauthorized. 

I filed a dispute with Citi, and the merchant was contacted. On XX/XX/year>, the dispute was closed as XXXX XXXX. 

I was informed in person by a Citi branch employee that the dispute had been resolved in my favor, yet no refund has been issued. I have not contacted the hotel directly, as I am currently in the U.S. 

Request : XXXX reversal of the {$130.00} charge. 

Related issues : XXXX XXXX agent charge ( {$360.00} ) CFPB ID : XXXX XXXX DOT OACP Case : #
